nasb.text: They mock at kings And rulers are a laughing matter to them. They laugh at every fortress And heap up rubble to capture it.

esv.text: At kings they scoff, and at rulers they laugh. They laugh at every fortress, for they pile up earth and take it.

cnv.text: 他們戲弄君王，以掌權的為笑柄； 他們嗤笑一切城堡，築壘攻取；

ccb.text: 他们嘲笑君王，讥讽首领， 对一切坚城嗤之以鼻， 修筑高台将其攻取。
